# foundry_group (Resource)

Manages a Foundry Group.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the group.
- `organizations` (List of String) List of organizations the group is under.
- `planned_group_members` (Set of String) Planned list of members in this group

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the group.

### Read-Only

- `group_members` (Set of String) Actual list of members in this group, computed after successful addition/removal of group members.
- `id` (String) Identifier of the group.
- `realm` (String) Realm of the group.
